name: Bowl o' Red
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs lean beef, cut into 1/2 cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the lard in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until softened.
3. Remove from heat and add meat, garlic, hot and mild chili powders, and cumin to the pot.
4. Break up any lumps. Stir in water and salt. Return to heat.
5. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally, until the meat is very tender and flavors are well blended.
6. Add more water if necessary.
7. Taste and adjust seasonings.
8. Have ice water on hand. (Note: Some people add cooked red beans to this mixture; you can decide.)
